mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_schedule t INNER JOIN student_course c ON t.course_id = c.course_id INNER JOIN tb_userinfo i on(c.loginID = i.loginID) WHERE c.loginID = #{loginId} -- 강의별 필터링 조건 추가시
AND t.course_id = #{course}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(t.score), 0) FROM test_detail t JOIN student_test_answer a ON t.course_id = a.course_id AND t.period = a.period AND t.question_no = a.question_no WHERE a.loginId = #{loginId} AND t.course_id = #{courseId} AND t.period = #{period} AND t.answer = a.student_answer
SELECT course_id, c.title FROM student_course sc JOIN course c USING (course_id) WHERE loginID = #{loginId} ORDER BY 1,2

SELECT course_id, period, title as testTitle, question_no as questionNo, content, option1, option2, option3, option4, answer, comment FROM test_detail INNER JOIN test_schedule using(course_id,period) WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND period = #{period} ORDER BY question_no
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_test_answer ( question_no, period, course_id, loginID, student_answer ) VALUES ( #{questionNo}, #{period}, #{courseId}, #{loginId}, #{studentAnswer} )
INSERT INTO student_test_schedule ( loginID, course_id, period, submit_date ) VALUES ( #{loginId}, #{courseId}, #{period}, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE submit_date = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT t.course_id AS courseId, t.period, ts.title, t.question_no AS questionNo, t.content, t.option1, t.option2, t.option3, t.option4, t.answer AS correctAnswer, a.student_answer AS studentAnswer, t.comment, (CASE WHEN t.answer = a.student_answer THEN t.score ELSE 0 END) AS earnedScore FROM test_detail t JOIN test_schedule ts ON t.course_id = ts.course_id AND t.period = ts.period LEFT JOIN student_test_answer a ON t.course_id = a.course_id AND t.period = a.period AND t.question_no = a.question_no AND a.loginID = #{loginId} WHERE t.course_id = #{courseId} AND t.period = #{period} ORDER BY t.question_no
